name: codex-official-docs-ingestion
description: Crawl official Codex documentation with Firecrawl and export markdown to docs/official.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch official Codex docs into docs/official.
interface.longDescription: Provides an ingestion skill and Firecrawl-backed script that crawls official Codex documentation and stores markdown plus crawl metadata under docs/official.
defaultPrompt: Use the ingestion skill to fetch official Codex docs.
Refresh docs/official from the latest Codex docs pages.
Crawl Codex docs and save markdown locally.
